title: verbena radicata var. glabra
intro: Verbena radicata var. glabra, also known as Glabrous Verbena or Smooth Verbena, is a flowering plant species native to Central and South America. It possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to its essential oil, which contains compounds such as limonene and linalool, that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Verbena radicata var. glabra include its potential to alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and stress, as well as its antiseptic and wound-healing properties. Verbena radicata var. glabra is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical applications, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
